mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Switch from long-duration cotton to short-duration pulses (mung/urad) or pearl millet (bajra).
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Implement broad bed furrow (BBF) sowing and apply straw mulching to conserve residual soil moisture.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Construct farm ponds (Shettale) and recharge existing open wells to capture sudden intense rain spells.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Replace water-intensive crops with drought-tolerant Sorghum (Jowar) or Horse Gram.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Intercrop Soybean with Pigeon Pea (4:2 ratio) to reduce risk of total crop failure.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Create contour trenches along slopes to slow down runoff and increase groundwater recharge.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Strictly avoid new sugarcane sowing; shift to short-duration pulses or oilseeds like Sunflower.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Use micro-irrigation (drip/sprinkler) for existing orchards and cash crops.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: De-silt local community tanks and check dams before monsoon onset to increase storage capacity.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Promote early-maturing cotton varieties or intercrop cotton with green gram.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Apply organic mulching and use hydrogels in the root zone to sustain moisture during dry spells.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Establish community farm ponds and enforce strict regulation on groundwater extraction.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Adopt drought-resistant sorghum varieties (e.g., CSH-14 or CSV-15) instead of cotton on shallow soils.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Adopt conservation tillage and leave crop residues on the soil surface.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Construct check dams on local streams to raise water tables.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Switch from groundnut to drought-hardy Foxtail Millet (Korra) or Pearl Millet (Sajja).
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Apply protective irrigation using farm ponds during critical flowering stages of groundnut.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Implement extensive rainwater harvesting structures like continuous contour trenches (CCT) and farm ponds.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Encourage intercropping of Groundnut + Pigeon Pea (7:1 or 11:1) to mitigate weather risk.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Use dead furrows at 3.6-meter intervals to conserve in-situ moisture.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Construct check dams and farm ponds to recharge shallow aquifers.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Shift to short-duration Sunflower or Sesame if monsoon is delayed beyond July.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Practice deep summer ploughing to destroy pests and improve soil water-holding capacity.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Recharge borewells using filter pits to secure water for critical crop growth stages.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Sow drought-tolerant Pearl Millet (Bajra) or Finger Millet (Ragi) instead of water-intensive crops.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Implement compartmental bunding to hold rainwater where it falls.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Construct farm ponds with plastic lining to prevent seepage in sandy-clay areas.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Avoid direct-seeded paddy if canal water is delayed; switch to light dry crops like Foxtail Millet.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Adopt drip irrigation for cotton to save up to 40% water.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Desilt and deepen community check dams to maximize storage from sudden monsoonal cloudbursts.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Exclusively grow extremely drought-tolerant Moth Bean, Cluster Bean, or local Bajra varieties.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Use plastic mulching and drip irrigation to minimize evaporation in desert heat.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Utilize traditional rainwater harvesting structures like 'Taankas' and 'Kundis' for farm-level storage.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Sow ultra-short-duration moth bean or cluster bean (maturing in 60-70 days).
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Apply straw/residue mulching around crop rows to prevent soil moisture evaporation.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Construct farm-scale 'Khadins' (runoff farming systems) to capture and utilize brief flash flood waters.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Shift to highly resilient grasses (like Dhaman grass) or agroforestry (Khejri trees) if rains fail completely.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Adopt windbreaks or shelterbelts of trees to reduce hot wind velocity and soil moisture loss.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Maintain and expand traditional 'Khadin' systems to secure single-crop Rabi cultivation on stored moisture.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Sow short-duration black gram (urad) or sesame instead of water-intensive paddy or long-duration crops.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Implement ridge-and-furrow method of sowing to conserve moisture in black clay soils.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Construct field bunds and farm ponds to retain rainwater and prevent soil erosion during cloudbursts.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Switch to drought-tolerant pulses like Pigeon Pea (Tur) or Lentils which thrive on residual moisture.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Apply organic mulch and practice zero-tillage to preserve soil structure and moisture.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Build check dams on local gullies to slow down flash floods and recharge groundwater.

mitigation_advisories.crop_switching: Adopt short-duration Soybean (e.g., JS 95-60) or Black Gram to escape late-season drought.
mitigation_advisories.moisture_conservation: Follow line sowing with proper spacing to reduce crop density and moisture competition.
mitigation_advisories.water_harvesting: Recharge traditional Bundela tanks and construct farm ponds to secure protective irrigation.
